The '''''Requital''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Voldt]] served aboard the ''Requital'' in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] when it [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdicted]] the [[Messenger (starship)|''Messenger'']].

{{Ship-stub}}
